auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ReadMe API key sent with HTTP Basic authentication. Create or rotate keys from the API Keys page in your ReadMe dashboard.

actions.name: ask_owlbot
actions.description: Ask ReadMe Owlbot a non-streaming question and return its answer with sources.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe Owlbot question payload.

answer.description: The generated answer returned by Owlbot.

items.description: One Owlbot source returned by ReadMe.

sources.description: The sources returned for the Owlbot answer.

raw.description: The raw Owlbot response returned by ReadMe.

actions.name: create_category
actions.description: Create a ReadMe guide or reference category.

version.description: The optional ReadMe project version to send with the x-readme-version header, for example v3.0.

title.description: A short title for the category.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe category creation payload.

category.description: The ReadMe category returned by the API.

actions.name: create_changelog
actions.description: Create a ReadMe changelog entry.

title.description: The title of the ReadMe changelog entry.

body.description: The body content of the ReadMe changelog entry.

hidden.description: Whether the changelog entry is hidden.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe changelog creation payload.

changelog.description: The ReadMe changelog returned by the API.

actions.name: create_custom_page
actions.description: Create a ReadMe custom page.

title.description: The title of the ReadMe custom page.

body.description: The Markdown body content for the custom page.

html.description: The HTML body content for the custom page.

htmlmode.description: Whether ReadMe should display html instead of body.

hidden.description: Whether the custom page is hidden.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe custom page creation payload.

customPage.description: The ReadMe custom page returned by the API.

actions.name: create_doc
actions.description: Create a ReadMe doc page using a category ID or category slug.

version.description: The optional ReadMe project version to send with the x-readme-version header, for example v3.0.

title.description: The title of the ReadMe doc.

body.description: The ReadMe-flavored Markdown body content for the page.

category.description: The ReadMe category ID for the page.

categorySlug.description: The ReadMe category slug for the page.

order.description: The position of the doc in the project sidebar.

parentDoc.description: The parent doc ID if the page is a subpage.

parentDocSlug.description: The parent doc slug if the page is a subpage.

error.description: Deprecated error-page metadata for ReadMe docs.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe doc creation payload.

doc.description: The ReadMe doc returned by the API.

actions.name: create_version
actions.description: Create a new ReadMe project version from an existing base version.

version.description: The semantic version identifier for the ReadMe project version.

codename.description: The codename for the ReadMe project version.

from.description: The semantic version to use as the base fork.

is_stable.description: Whether this version should be the main stable version.

pdfStatus.description: The PDF generation status for the version.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe version creation payload.

version.description: The ReadMe version returned by the API.

actions.name: delete_api_specification
actions.description: Delete one ReadMe API specification by ID.

id.description: The API specification ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe API specification identifier.

deleted.description: Whether the ReadMe resource was deleted.

actions.name: delete_category
actions.description: Delete one ReadMe category by slug.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe slug to request.

version.description: The optional ReadMe project version to send with the x-readme-version header, for example v3.0.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe slug and optional project version.

deleted.description: Whether the ReadMe resource was deleted.

actions.name: delete_changelog
actions.description: Delete one ReadMe changelog entry by slug.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe changelog slug to delete.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe changelog slug to delete.

deleted.description: Whether the ReadMe resource was deleted.

actions.name: delete_custom_page
actions.description: Delete one ReadMe custom page by slug.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe custom page slug to delete.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe custom page slug to delete.

deleted.description: Whether the ReadMe resource was deleted.

actions.name: delete_doc
actions.description: Delete one ReadMe doc page by slug.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe slug to request.

version.description: The optional ReadMe project version to send with the x-readme-version header, for example v3.0.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe slug and optional project version.

deleted.description: Whether the ReadMe resource was deleted.

actions.name: delete_version
actions.description: Delete one ReadMe project version by semver identifier.

versionId.description: The semver identifier for the project version, preferably the version_clean value from list_versions.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe version identifier to delete.

deleted.description: Whether the ReadMe resource was deleted.

actions.name: get_api_registry
actions.description: Retrieve one ReadMe API Registry entry by UUID.

uuid.description: The API Registry UUID to retrieve from ReadMe.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe API Registry entry identifier to request.

registry.description: The ReadMe API Registry entry returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The ReadMe API Registry entry response.

actions.name: get_category
actions.description: Get one ReadMe category by slug.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe slug to request.

version.description: The optional ReadMe project version to send with the x-readme-version header, for example v3.0.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe slug and optional project version.

category.description: The ReadMe category returned by the API.

actions.name: get_changelog
actions.description: Get one ReadMe changelog entry by slug.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe changelog slug to request.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe changelog slug to request.

changelog.description: The ReadMe changelog returned by the API.

actions.name: get_custom_page
actions.description: Get one ReadMe custom page by slug.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe custom page slug to request.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe custom page slug to request.

customPage.description: The ReadMe custom page returned by the API.

actions.name: get_doc
actions.description: Get one ReadMe doc by slug, optionally requesting the production doc version.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe doc slug to request.

production.description: Whether to request the production version of the doc.

version.description: The optional ReadMe project version to send with the x-readme-version header, for example v3.0.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe doc slug and retrieval options.

doc.description: The ReadMe doc returned by the API.

actions.name: get_openapi_schema
actions.description: Get the OpenAPI definition for the ReadMe project.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this ReadMe action.

schema.description: The OpenAPI definition returned by ReadMe.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Get metadata for the ReadMe project associated with the API key.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this ReadMe action.

baseUrl.description: The public base URL for the ReadMe project.

plan.description: The ReadMe project plan when returned.

project.description: ReadMe project metadata returned for the API key.

actions.name: get_version
actions.description: Get one ReadMe project version by semver identifier.

versionId.description: The semver identifier for the project version, preferably the version_clean value from list_versions.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe version identifier to request.

version.description: The ReadMe version returned by the API.

actions.name: list_api_specifications
actions.description: List ReadMe API specification metadata with optional version and pagination.

version.description: The optional ReadMe project version to send with the x-readme-version header, for example v3.0.

perPage.description: The number of items to include per page. ReadMe accepts values up to 100.

page.description: The one-based page number to request.

inputSchema.description: Optional ReadMe version and pagination parameters.

apiSpecifications.description: The ReadMe API specification metadata records returned by the API.

raw.description: The raw ReadMe API specification metadata payload.

link.description: The raw Link response header returned by ReadMe when present.

totalCount.description: The x-total-count response header returned by ReadMe when present.

outputSchema.description: The ReadMe API specification metadata response.

actions.name: list_categories
actions.description: List ReadMe guide and reference categories with optional version and pagination.

version.description: The optional ReadMe project version to send with the x-readme-version header, for example v3.0.

perPage.description: The number of items to include per page. ReadMe accepts values up to 100.

page.description: The one-based page number to request.

inputSchema.description: Optional ReadMe version and pagination parameters.

categories.description: The ReadMe categories returned by the API.

link.description: The raw Link response header returned by ReadMe when present.

totalCount.description: The x-total-count response header returned by ReadMe when present.

actions.name: list_category_docs
actions.description: List the ReadMe docs that belong to a category slug.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe slug to request.

version.description: The optional ReadMe project version to send with the x-readme-version header, for example v3.0.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe slug and optional project version.

docs.description: The ReadMe docs returned for the category.

raw.description: The raw ReadMe category docs payload.

actions.name: list_changelogs
actions.description: List ReadMe changelog entries with optional pagination.

perPage.description: The number of items to include per page. ReadMe accepts values up to 100.

page.description: The one-based page number to request.

inputSchema.description: Optional ReadMe changelog pagination parameters.

changelogs.description: The ReadMe changelogs returned by the API.

link.description: The raw Link response header returned by ReadMe when present.

totalCount.description: The x-total-count response header returned by ReadMe when present.

actions.name: list_custom_pages
actions.description: List ReadMe custom pages with optional pagination.

perPage.description: The number of items to include per page. ReadMe accepts values up to 100.

page.description: The one-based page number to request.

inputSchema.description: Optional ReadMe custom page pagination parameters.

customPages.description: The ReadMe custom pages returned by the API.

link.description: The raw Link response header returned by ReadMe when present.

totalCount.description: The x-total-count response header returned by ReadMe when present.

actions.name: list_outbound_ips
actions.description: List ReadMe outbound IP addresses used for webhook and Try It proxy requests.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this ReadMe action.

items.description: One ReadMe outbound IP address entry.

outboundIps.description: The outbound IP address entries returned by ReadMe.

outputSchema.description: The ReadMe outbound IP address response.

actions.name: list_versions
actions.description: List the versions configured for the ReadMe project.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this ReadMe action.

versions.description: The ReadMe versions returned by the API.

actions.name: search_docs
actions.description: Search ReadMe docs by text query.

search.description: The search text to look for in ReadMe docs.

version.description: The optional ReadMe project version to send with the x-readme-version header, for example v3.0.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe docs search query and optional project version.

results.description: The ReadMe docs returned by search.

actions.name: update_category
actions.description: Update one ReadMe category by slug.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe category slug to update.

version.description: The optional ReadMe project version to send with the x-readme-version header, for example v3.0.

title.description: A short title for the category.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe category update payload.

category.description: The ReadMe category returned by the API.

actions.name: update_changelog
actions.description: Update one ReadMe changelog entry by slug.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe changelog slug to update.

title.description: The title of the ReadMe changelog entry.

body.description: The body content of the ReadMe changelog entry.

hidden.description: Whether the changelog entry is hidden.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe changelog update payload.

changelog.description: The ReadMe changelog returned by the API.

actions.name: update_custom_page
actions.description: Update one ReadMe custom page by slug.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe custom page slug to update.

title.description: The title of the ReadMe custom page.

body.description: The Markdown body content for the custom page.

html.description: The HTML body content for the custom page.

htmlmode.description: Whether ReadMe should display html instead of body.

hidden.description: Whether the custom page is hidden.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe custom page update payload.

customPage.description: The ReadMe custom page returned by the API.

actions.name: update_doc
actions.description: Update one ReadMe doc page by slug.

slug.description: The URL-safe ReadMe doc slug to update.

version.description: The optional ReadMe project version to send with the x-readme-version header, for example v3.0.

title.description: The title of the ReadMe doc.

body.description: The ReadMe-flavored Markdown body content for the page.

category.description: The ReadMe category ID for the page.

categorySlug.description: The ReadMe category slug for the page.

order.description: The position of the doc in the project sidebar.

parentDoc.description: The parent doc ID if the page is a subpage.

parentDocSlug.description: The parent doc slug if the page is a subpage.

error.description: Deprecated error-page metadata for ReadMe docs.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe doc update payload.

doc.description: The ReadMe doc returned by the API.

actions.name: update_version
actions.description: Update one ReadMe project version by semver identifier.

versionId.description: The semver identifier for the ReadMe project version to update.

version.description: The semantic version identifier for the ReadMe project version.

codename.description: The codename for the ReadMe project version.

from.description: The semantic version to use as the base fork.

is_stable.description: Whether this version should be the main stable version.

pdfStatus.description: The PDF generation status for the version.

inputSchema.description: The ReadMe version update payload.

version.description: The ReadMe version returned by the API.
